Had a hook data, but called depositForBurn function instead of depositForBurnWithHook function: 

https://sepolia.basescan.org/tx/0x9a211480686f6d2e576fe9b546d8cc2b0020cd17fb59080a135700ce3cede2dc#eventlog#27

const options = {method: 'GET'};

fetch('https://iris-api-sandbox.circle.com/v2/messages/6?transactionHash=0x3163243c0e7e94e48e8c20d95420491ad9b88cb5c17264fabd4345e332066980', options)

  .then(res => console.log(res))
  .catch(err => console.error(err));
